notes.body: Only 30 Cents more for Large! — Large Soda is now 30¢ more than Regular (was 10¢). Every cashier/shift lead must update suggestive-sell language today. Old 'For only 10 cents more...' phrasing is dead. Drill at pre-shift.

Orientation Checklist for ALL new hires. Halo Effect & Suggestive Sales — signed forms were due to Crystal by Friday 5/8 5:00 PM (deadline past — confirm all 20 forms are in her inbox). FGU 0% overdue by Friday 5/15.
Shopper Dashboard & FGX Info — print 2065 Shopper Dashboard & K.P.I. document, post on comm board, be ready to discuss with Crystal in-store this week.
L-Rev (Labor Review) overdue for 5/11/2026 at KY-2065. Bobby/MOD: log into NetChef and close this task before EOD.
Subject 'Anthony' — body empty (Sent from iPhone). Madison flagging something about Anthony. Talk to her in person today — do not wait on email.
